'''Algrann''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] senior watch and technical officer on ''[[Outbound Flight]] ''during the time of the [[Separatist Crisis/Legends|Separatist Crisis]].

==Biography==
In [[27 BBY/Legends|27 BBY]], Algrann worked for the [[Outbound Flight Project]]. As a [[Technician/Legends|technician]], he ensured the smooth running of the project. During a shift in which he was supposed to work with [[Sivv]] in the monitor room, the [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Justyn Ma'Ning]] claimed the space for himself and left the technicians outside the door where they met [[Chas Uliar]]. They explained that Ma'Ning wanted to bring some students closer to the control room. When Uliar wanted to visit Master [[Jorus C'baoth]] in order to raise the Jedi in a protest, neither Algrann nor Sivv were willing to accompany their colleagues.<ref name="Outbound Flight" />

{{Char-stub}}
